summary: Frontend testing of Employee Restriction & Protection Clause (Indian Law Compliant Version) in Employment Agreements feature completed successfully. All Section 7 subsections (7.1-7.5) are properly displayed in the preview modal.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: Employment Agreements page loads correctly via sidebar navigation
Existing agreement for 'ahmad' displays with preview, edit, delete buttons
Preview modal opens when clicking the eye icon button
Preview modal shows all sections including the new Section 7 - Employee Restriction & Protection Clause
Section 7 header styled in red with '(Indian Law Compliant Version)' subtitle
Section 7.1 Non-Compete During Employment shows 3km radius restriction
Section 7.1 lists prohibited activities (competing business, work for competitor, consultancy, financial interest)
Section 7.2 Post-Employment Non-Solicitation shows 12 months restriction
Section 7.2 prohibits client solicitation, employee inducement, diverting business, using confidential info
Section 7.3 Confidentiality shows all business data items (client database, pricing strategy, business model, financial data, source code, vendor details, trade secrets)
Section 7.3 includes breach consequences in red box (legal action, damages, injunction)
Section 7.4 Intellectual Property clause is present - work products are company property
Section 7.5 Legal Remedies references Indian Contract Act and IT Act
Section 7.5 lists company rights (injunction relief, damages, legal costs, criminal complaint)
Print button visible and functional in preview modal
Download PDF button works - shows 'PDF generated successfully' toast
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee Restriction & Protection Clause successfully added to Employment Agreements. Section 7 contains 5 subsections: 7.1 Non-Compete During Employment (3km radius), 7.2 Post-Employment Non-Solicitation (12 months), 7.3 Confidentiality (Permanent with 7 business data types), 7.4 Intellectual Property, 7.5 Legal Remedies (Indian Contract Act, IT Act). Preview modal has Print and Download PDF functionality working.

section_7_employee_restriction_clause.header: Working - 7. EMPLOYEE RESTRICTION & PROTECTION CLAUSE (Indian Law Compliant Version)
section_7_employee_restriction_clause.7.1_non_compete: Working - 3km radius, lists 4 prohibited activities, applies to all involvement types
section_7_employee_restriction_clause.7.2_non_solicitation: Working - 12 months post-employment, 4 prohibitions, Indian law enforceability note
section_7_employee_restriction_clause.7.3_confidentiality: Working - 7 business data types listed, permanent obligation, breach consequences in red box
section_7_employee_restriction_clause.7.4_intellectual_property: Working - All work products are company property
section_7_employee_restriction_clause.7.5_legal_remedies: Working - 4 remedy types, references Indian Contract Act and IT Act

preview_modal_actions.download_pdf_button: Working - generates PDF with success toast
